headline: Gear Up for Marriott (MAR) Q1 Earnings: Wall Street Estimates for Key Metrics
summary: Besides Wall Street's top-and-bottom-line estimates for Marriott (MAR), review projections for some of its key metrics to gain a deeper understanding of how the company might have fared during the quarter ended March 2026.

headline: A Look At Marriott International (MAR) Valuation After Strong Recent Shareholder Returns
summary: Marriott International (MAR) has drawn attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing gains over the past month and the past three months while also posting mixed short term daily and weekly returns. See our latest analysis for Marriott International.
